summary:
MINISTRY OPERATIONS AND SECURITY: Brandon clarifies the structure and naming of the Prayer Changes Things Foundation, emphasizing that it functions as a tax-exempt online church rather than a traditional foundation. He explains that his wife, Diana, holds a master's degree in accounting and diligently manages the ministry's finances while working full-time, homeschooling their children, and running her own online business. Brandon addresses rumors about their newly purchased ministry property and defends his financial transparency, noting that the ministry operates under strict legal and professional guidance. Due to severe and consistent death threats, he discloses that the FBI and local law enforcement have advised him to secure a safe haven for his family. Consequently, he plans to hire an ex-military, full-time armed bodyguard to ensure their safety, acknowledging the intense pressure and persecution that accompany his public platform.

PROPHETIC VISIONS AND GLOBAL CONFLICTS: Brandon details a series of dire prophetic warnings regarding international security and geopolitical instability. He foresees Iranian sleeper cells infiltrating the United States to orchestrate terror plots, including deploying explosive-laden drones along the West Coast. Furthermore, Brandon describes a highly sophisticated bombing plot targeting a marathon in Boston, orchestrated by three Middle Eastern individuals using 3D-printed explosives disguised as soda cans. He also warns of lone-wolf attacks on spring art festivals across America, intended as distractions for larger terror events. Globally, Brandon predicts that Great Britain will join the United States and Israel in a military conflict against Iran, leading to targeted strikes on oil infrastructure in the Strait of Hormuz. These strikes, he asserts, will disrupt global shipping, causing oil prices to surge near two hundred dollars a barrel and triggering severe gas shortages and mile-long gas lines reminiscent of the 1970s.

NATURAL DISASTERS AND DIVINE SHAKINGS: Brandon prophesies an escalation in catastrophic natural disasters, specifically pointing to an impending 8.2 magnitude earthquake with an epicenter near Rome and the Vatican. He claims this seismic event will serve as a divine shaking to expose corruption and perversion within the Catholic Church, ultimately correcting theological doctrines and awakening the global Christian body. In addition to seismic activity, Brandon foresees a massive earthquake and tsunami scenario where hundreds of thousands will perish along a coastline, preceded by smaller tremors serving as warning signs. He also mentions an impending geopolitical and spiritual shaking in Japan, highlighting a specific vision of a bridge over clear water being targeted.

POLITICAL FORECASTS AND ECONOMIC SHIFTS: Brandon shares predictions concerning the political and economic landscape of the United States. He anticipates future actions by Donald Trump, asserting that Trump will announce a massive deal to open a new domestic oil refinery, leading to immense wealth and energy independence. Brandon also highlights a forthcoming piece of legislation, the Stability and Crypto Act, which he believes will usher in a new industrial revolution and facilitate a significant transfer of wealth for believers. However, he also warns of foreign interference, specifically predicting that China will use cyber tactics to disrupt American midterm elections and influence political processes in Australia.

COMBATING HUMAN TRAFFICKING AND CARTEL VIOLENCE: Brandon describes a violent vision involving the assassination of a high-ranking Mexican cartel leader operating near the Gulf region. He visualizes heavily armed cartel members in a convoy being targeted by an explosive blast. Brandon explains that this divine intervention is aimed at dismantling human trafficking networks that exploit vulnerable teenage girls across Mexico and Europe. He emphasizes that the victims are crying out for help, and God is actively moving to expose these secret, corrupt operations, bringing divine justice and liberation to the exploited youth.

PERSONAL TESTIMONY AND SPIRITUAL TEACHINGS: Brandon reflects on his humble beginnings, recounting a twenty-year period of severe poverty where his family lived in a dilapidated, mold-infested house. He shares personal miracles from that era, including a divine visitation from Jesus in his kitchen and the resurrection of a deceased dog. Brandon discusses his daughter Megan's ongoing battle with severe special needs, framing their journey as a testament to faith and endurance. Transitioning into spiritual instruction, he teaches that spiritual warfare cannot be won through prayer alone. Instead, Brandon insists that believers must deeply internalize and verbally declare the Word of God as a weapon against demonic forces, addictions, and temptations, drawing a parallel to how Jesus used scripture to defeat the devil in the wilderness.
